overall.description: A first-person walk along a wooden dock at sunset, passing a large market umbrella and approaching an open waterfront view. The scene features industrial warehouse architecture and distant mountains, rendered in high-quality game engine graphics with cinematic golden hour lighting.

large two-tone market umbrella on the dock edge
rusted orange metal railing along the dock edge
tall metal lattice tower on the distant shore
silhouetted hills against the sunset sky

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wooden dock beside an industrial warehouse building, approaching a large red and yellow market umbrella. The sun sets behind distant mountains, casting warm golden light across the calm water.

scene_state.functional_zone: open waterfront pier with expansive water view

events.description: passing the large market umbrella, opening up to the expansive waterfront view

agents.ego_description: continuing along the dock past the umbrella into the open waterfront area

segments.scene_description: Having passed the market umbrella, the view opens up to the expansive waterfront with unobstructed views of the sunset behind the mountains. The industrial warehouse recedes along the right side as the camera continues forward along the pier.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a wooden dock that transitions from a sheltered industrial corridor into an expansive, open waterfront view. It begins by moving beside a large industrial warehouse, approaching a vibrant red and yellow market umbrella under the warm glow of a setting sun. As the camera passes the umbrella, the narrow perspective opens up, revealing a wide vista of calm water and distant mountains. The industrial building gradually recedes to the right as the camera continues forward, finally leaving the structures behind to face the unobstructed golden light of the sunset.
